headline: Aecon schedules first quarter 2026 financial results release and conference call
summary: TORONTO, March 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) announced today that it intends to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026 after market close, and has scheduled a live webcast and conference call for 9 a.m. (Eastern Time) on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. A live webcast of the conference call can be accessed using this link and will be available at www.aecon.com/InvestorCalendar. Participants can also dial-in to the conference call and pre-

headline: This United Natural Foods Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Thursday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names. See full changes on analyst ratings page. UNFI stock: upgraded to Overweight with $56 PT.

headline: The S&P 500's Thanksgiving Leftover Stocks In March 2026
summary: The Thanksgiving Leftover Stocks are a group of ten stocks that Seeking Alpha's Jason Capul identified as "Thanksgiving leftovers no one wants".
